## **TZ2.3. SECTION 3 -- REGULATORY RESULT**

### **TZ2.3.1. PANSA NET GAIN/LOSS ON ACTIVITY IN THE POLAND TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 2 IN 2025**

PANSA reported a net gain of +2.1 M€, as a combination of a gain of +0.7 M€ arising from the cost sharing mechanism, with a gain of +1.4 M€ arising from the traffic risk sharing mechanism.

### **TZ2.3.2. PANSA OVERALL REGULATORY RESULT (RR) ON ACTIVITY IN THE TERMINAL CHARGING ZONE 2**

Ex-post, the overall RR, taking into account the net gain from the terminal activity mentioned above (+2.1 M€) and the actual RoE (+2.1 M€), amounts to +4.2 M€ (8.6% of the terminal revenues). The resulting ex-post rate of return on equity is 12.9%, which is higher than the 6.5% planned in the PP.

### **TZ2.3.3. NOTES**

#### **TZ2.3.3.1. NOTE 1**

#### **TZ2.3.3.2. NOTE 2**
